review.headlinePending: {count, plural, one {# supplier} other {# suppliers}} pending · {amount}/mo at stake
review.headlineMissing: Run M039 to enable cost review
review.headlineEmpty: All caught up — nothing pending review.
review.context: {count, plural, one {# flag} other {# flags}} across {period}
review.tableMissingBanner: overhead_flags table missing — run M039-OVERHEAD-REVIEW.sql in Supabase SQL Editor.
review.backfillResult: Backfill complete — marked {marked, plural, one {# supplier} other {# suppliers}} as essential, resolved {resolved, plural, one {# pending flag} other {# pending flags}}.
review.emptyStable: Your costs look stable. Nothing to review this period.

card.reexplainTitle: Regenerate AI explanation with full 12-month history

dismissModal.title: Plan to cancel: {supplier}?
dismissModal.body: Marks this as a planned cancellation. Counts toward your monthly savings projection. The system will keep an eye on it — if it reappears in next month's books, you'll see a flag again.
dismissModal.placeholder: e.g. cancelling at end of contract, March renewal

backfillBanner.title: First-time review — too much to wade through?
backfillBanner.body: We can mark every supplier from the last 12 months as essential in one go. From then on, only new costs and price increases of more than 15% will be flagged.

upload.headlineEmpty: Drop your Fortnox P&L PDFs below to get started.
upload.contextEmpty: Yearly P&L, monthly P&L, or supplier invoices. AI reads the PDF, extracts every line item, then you confirm before it hits your data.

drop.default: Drop Fortnox PDFs here or click to select
drop.constraints: PDF only · up to 10 MB each · up to 20 at a time

reextractAll.button: Re-extract all {count} PDFs with current AI
reextractAll.title: Re-run the current AI extractor on all {count} PDF(s). PDFs stay in storage — no re-upload needed.
reextractAll.confirm: Re-run AI extraction on all {count} PDF(s) for {name}? Each will need to be re-Applied individually after extraction completes (~20-60s per PDF).

emptyAttention.title: Nothing uploaded yet
emptyAttention.yearlyMessage: drop your Fortnox annual resultaträkning to track year-over-year overhead drift.
emptyAttention.monthlyMessage: any months with Fortnox PDF detail land in /tracker and /overheads — AI flags cost creep.

upload.footerLink: Applied rows feed {trackerLink} and the overheads breakdown below (landing next commit).

toast.alreadyExtracting: Already extracting — wait for it to finish.

pdf.fallbackPre: Your browser can't embed this PDF.
pdf.fallbackLink: Open it in a new tab

confirms.reject: Reject this upload? Applied data will be rolled back.
confirms.reextract: Re-run AI extraction on this PDF? The stored data stays until you click Apply on the new extraction.

errors.ackConflict: Please acknowledge the conflict before applying.

validation.title: Pre-apply checks
validation.hardErrors: ⛔ {count, plural, one {# hard error} other {# hard errors}} — cannot apply
validation.softErrors: ⚠ {count, plural, one {# error} other {# errors}} — override required
validation.warnings: ⚠ {count, plural, one {# warning} other {# warnings}} — tick each to acknowledge
validation.forceLabel: I have reviewed the {count, plural, one {error} other {errors}} and want to force apply anyway

conflict.title: Existing data for this period
conflict.bodyPost: for the same month. Compare the numbers below and acknowledge before continuing — the old values are preserved in the audit log ({code}) but will no longer drive the P&L.
conflict.ack: Yes, replace the existing entry with the Fortnox values.
